risks.title: Unreviewed Security File Modifications
risks.evidence: Multiple high-confidence events (relevance 0.85-0.95) indicate changes to /home/riad/github/kairos/src/screens/Security.tsx, a sensitive security module, without documented review status
risks.recommendedAction: Immediately review the diff for Security.tsx and run security validation tests before any deployment

risks.title: Duplicate Event Monitoring
risks.evidence: Four events for identical file modification within 2ms (two pairs at 19:02:22 and 19:02:39), indicating monitoring system redundancy or misconfiguration
risks.recommendedAction: Investigate code-observer to implement event deduplication and reduce monitoring noise

opportunities.title: Automated Security Test Gate
opportunities.evidence: Security file modifications are tracked but lack automated validation checks before changes merge
opportunities.suggestedAction: Implement CI/CD rule: security-related files require passing security linting and vulnerability scans

opportunities.title: Monitoring System Optimization
opportunities.evidence: Duplicate events suggest opportunities to improve signal quality and reduce alert fatigue
opportunities.suggestedAction: Add event deduplication logic to code-observer with 2-5ms dedupe window

taskCandidates.title: Review Security.tsx Changes
taskCandidates.description: Examine all modifications to /home/riad/github/kairos/src/screens/Security.tsx from 2026-04-27T19:02:22Z onward for correctness, vulnerabilities, and compliance
taskCandidates.rationale: Security modules demand high scrutiny; events flagged this file for explicit review

taskCandidates.title: Run Security Tests on Modified Code
taskCandidates.description: Execute security linting, dependency scanning, and vulnerability checks on Security.tsx to validate changes
taskCandidates.rationale: Code observer explicitly suggested running security tests; critical for security-sensitive code

taskCandidates.title: Fix Event Deduplication in Monitoring
taskCandidates.description: Update code-observer to suppress duplicate events within 5ms window for identical file modifications
taskCandidates.rationale: Duplicate events reduce signal clarity and waste processing resources

recommendations.title: Urgent: Review Security File Before Deploy
recommendations.rationale: Security file changes require verification before deployment to prevent vulnerabilities reaching production
recommendations.action: Diff Security.tsx against main branch, review for auth/secrets/permissions changes, run full security test suite

recommendations.title: Establish Mandatory Security Review Gates
recommendations.rationale: Prevent vulnerabilities by enforcing review discipline on sensitive modules
recommendations.action: Add CODEOWNERS rule requiring security team approval for files matching **/*ecurity* pattern
